## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Town and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, traffic analysis, and next steps for improving blog performance and lead generation.](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog traffic is growing but still volatile; building consistent traffic remains the top priority](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Event analysis shows good engagement (4 page views on average) but low click-through rates on CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Need to better define and track key conversion events (e.g., visits to app.town.com, sign-ups)](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Experimenting with middle/bottom funnel content and UX improvements planned alongside high-volume keyword targeting](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

## Topics

### Traffic and Engagement Analysis

  - [Overall website traffic (impressions and clicks) is trending positively](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Blog traffic shows alternating weeks of high engagement vs. broader reach](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [Good engagement metrics: 4 page views on average, high scroll rates](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Low click-through rates on internal links and CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Seed announcement article driving significant traffic, but may not be ideal audience](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

### Content Strategy and Experimentation

  - [Continuing focus on building consistent traffic through informational content](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Planning to experiment with middle/bottom funnel topics (case studies, expert interviews, behind-the-scenes content)](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)
  - [Considering UX improvements: table of contents, inline CTAs, author bios with booking options](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Upcoming high-volume keyword topics for e-commerce and real estate verticals](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Current reliance on Google Analytics for website data](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Need to integrate PostHog data for better insight into user journey and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Goal: Track why users visit the site, what they do, and how many sign up](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [Action item: Set up GA tracking for key conversion events (e.g., visits to app.town.com, onboarding URL)](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)

### Content Production Workflow

  - [Two articles ready to publish, five more under review](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [New batch of topics coming this week, including middle/bottom funnel proposals](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [Shifting to discuss content production over Slack, focusing meetings on metrics and insights](https://fathom.video/share/rJgc22q6HmqSi2H9EqgTSocQNzYY1D_s?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)

## Next Steps

1.  Set up Google Analytics tracking for key conversion events (visits to app.town.com, onboarding URL)
2.  Provide GrowthX team access to PostHog analytics
3.  Review and approve author bios for content attribution
4.  Implement table of contents on existing blog posts
5.  Review and approve upcoming batch of content topics, including middle/bottom funnel proposals
6.  Investigate queries driving traffic to the seed announcement article
7.  Continue reviewing and publishing prepared content (2 ready, 5 under review)
8.  Experiment with UX improvements (inline CTAs, author bios with booking options)
9.  Develop case studies, expert interviews, and behind-the-scenes content
